events.text: *Judgment:* the sources do not disclose per-order delivery cost, CA
C, cohort retention or a clean contribution margin. Gross margin is being used as a proxy.

Order-level cost data would materially change confidence in the unit-economics view.

events.text: 16.8%, blending bull, base and bear cases, remains above the benchmark even
after weighting for downside scenarios, indicating the base-case return is not solely dependent on the bull case materializing.

after weighting for downside scenarios, indicating the base-case return is no

events.text:
